description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:alpine Docker image, setting DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and GRADLE_OPTS='-Dorg.gradle.daemon=false', and defining a before_script that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME to the .gradle directory in the workspace. Define two stages: build and test, and cache the .gradle/caches directory. In the build stage add a build job that runs 'gradle assemble' and stores the ./build directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a test job that runs 'gradle check'.
